text.autoconfig.charaformact.title: CharaFormAct Options
text.autoconfig.charaformact.option.bump: Extra frames for bumped block rendering
gamerule.cfaAllowNullAppearance: Allow characters to enter forms for which they have no valid model
gamerule.cfaRestrictBapsInAdventureMode: Adventure mode players' baps embrittle blocks instead of breaking them
gamerule.cfaBreakBrittleBlocksInAdventur: Players in adventure mode may break embrittled blocks
gamerule.cfaFriendliesResistCollisionAtt: Collision attacks don't damage pets and teammates
gamerule.cfaDisableCharacterMovementChec: Disable movement checks when playing as any character
gamerule.cfaAlwaysRevertToWeakestForm: Characters revert to weakest possible form at 0 health
origin.charaformact.character.name: Character
origin.charaformact.character.descriptio: Play as a character using the CharaFormAct API.
layer.charaformact.character_layer.name: Character
